title: Celestial Archives
storyPurpose: Celestial Archives unlock for Mira's team.

panels.description: Archive doors of living gold open; constellation shelves unfold holographic star charts.

Professor Elyan Voss the Riftwright: older brilliant engineer-scholar, ink-stained fingers, forge-coat with crystal lenses, weary hope, not a villain silhouette and Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes read (text-free) schematic of Forge Network linked to Star Engine — two halves.

bubbles.text: Arkan would have smiled at this sync… The Network was never complete without this.
bubbles.speaker: Professor Elyan Voss
Professor Elyan Voss
bubbles.text: Whoever rewrote the old protocols… still older than Meridian. Unsolved.

panels.description: Nova curls against a Prime cradle; Astra rests; Mira's hand on Spark — family tableau.

bubbles.text: Nova returns home — and finds home has changed forever.

dialogue.text: Arkan would have smiled at this sync… The Network was never complete without this.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. White crystal and emerald vegetation first; gold architecture, aurora lighting, cyan-gold Rift accents, blue cavern skies with visible stars, floating waterfalls. NO purple neon AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Shattered Star" Issue #10 Volume Two, STORY PAGE 21/25 — Celestial Archives. Story purpose: Celestial Archives unlock for Mira's team. Layout: three-row. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p21a): Archive doors of living gold open; constellation shelves unfold holographic star charts. Panel 2 (p21b): Professor Elyan Voss the Riftwright: older brilliant engineer-scholar, ink-stained fingers, forge-coat with crystal lenses, weary hope, not a villain silhouette and Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes read (text-free) schematic of Forge Network linked to Star Engine — two halves. Panel 3 (p21c): Nova curls against a Prime cradle; Astra rests; Mira's hand on Spark — family tableau. Characters: mira-eggwarden, elyan-voss, high-keeper-lyra. Creatures: nova, spark, astra, axiom. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Nova design lock: Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Lyra lock: High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics. Astra lock: Astra: massive celestial wolf Prime Companion, galaxy fur with constellation markings, golden antlers, blue crystalline wings, nebula tail, legendary support presence. Axiom lock: Axiom: small floating crystalline fox prototype, transparent body with glowing circuitry, holographic tail, soft cyan-gold light. Environment: Shattered Star celestial sanctuary. Time: day-aurora. Weather: rift aurora mist. Lighting: white crystal, gold architecture, aurora cyan-gold. Continuity: {"archives": "unlocked"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space. NO readable text in artwork. NO Cal Reed.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; tails off faces and Spark/Nova/Astra eyes; Lyra speech calm/stern.
artAlt: Celestial Archives — The Shattered Star page 21
transcript: SPEECH (Professor Elyan Voss): Arkan would have smiled at this sync… The Network was never complete without this.
WHISPER (Professor Elyan Voss): Whoever rewrote the old protocols… still older than Meridian. Unsolved.
NARRATION: Nova returns home — and finds home has changed forever.
